summary: Comprehensive testing of Employment Agreements module completed successfully. All features working correctly including CRUD operations, auto-populate from employee records, 4 pre-built templates, PDF generation, and agreement preview.

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - minor accessibility issue

passed_tests: Navigate to Employment Agreements page from sidebar
Employment Agreements page loads with correct title and subtitle
Existing agreement for 'Firdous Ahmad Bedar' displays correctly (GM, general, 01 Jan 2026, ₹30,200/mo)
New Agreement button opens modal
All 5 tabs present (Company, Employee, Compensation, Terms, Penalty)
Template dropdown shows 4 templates (Standard, Probation, Contract, Executive)
Template selection changes default values (Probation: 7 days notice, 0 months non-compete)
Employee dropdown shows available employees (Firdous Ahmad Bedar - GM, fab - peon)
Auto-populate fills employee details when selecting from dropdown
Toast notification 'Employee data loaded' appears after auto-populate
Compensation tab shows Fixed + Daily Allowance Model with calculation
Terms tab shows Notice Period, Non-Compete, Governing Law, Additional Terms, Confidentiality checkbox
Penalty tab shows Early Exit Compensation with Employee and Employer penalty amounts
View button opens Agreement Preview modal
Preview shows complete document structure (Position, Compensation, Terms, Early Exit, Signatures)
Print button available in preview
Download PDF button generates PDF successfully
PDF filename includes employee name (employment-agreement-Firdous Ahmad Bedar.pdf)
Toast notification 'PDF generated successfully' appears
Edit button opens modal with pre-filled data
Edit modal shows 'Edit Agreement' title and 'Update Agreement' button
All agreement data pre-filled in edit mode
Status filter dropdown works (All Status, Draft, Pending Signature, Signed, Terminated)
Search by employee name or job title works
Refresh button reloads data
critical_code_review_comments: All CRUD endpoints properly implemented with tenant isolation
Auto-populate correctly fetches employee data including name, address, designation, department, start date
Templates have proper default_terms that update form values when selected
PDF generation uses html2canvas + jsPDF for client-side generation
Agreement preview shows complete document structure with all sections
Edit mode correctly prevents editing signed agreements (returns 400)
Frontend has proper data-testid on main page container
seed_data_creation: None - used existing agreement for 'Firdous Ahmad Bedar' and employees 'fab' and 'Firdous Ahmad Bedar'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Employment Agreements module fully tested and working. Key features: 4 templates (Standard, Probation, Contract, Executive), auto-populate from employee records, PDF generation via html2canvas+jsPDF, agreement preview with all sections. Test file created at /app/backend/tests/test_employment_agreements.py with 16 comprehensive tests. Existing test agreement for 'Firdous Ahmad Bedar' (GM, ₹30,200/mo) available for testing.
